title: Extend eraser and free transform tools for all diagram elements

requirements.summary: Extend the eraser tool to erase all diagram element types (icons, text labels, freehand drawings, lines/arrows, and images)
acceptanceCriteria: Eraser tool removes icons/attack path nodes when clicked or dragged over them
Eraser tool removes text labels when clicked or dragged over them
Eraser tool removes freehand drawings when clicked or dragged over them
Eraser tool removes line and arrow connections when clicked or dragged over them
Eraser tool removes image elements when clicked or dragged over them
All other toolbar tools remain unaffected

file_operations.description: Extend the eraser tool (toolbar button 7, tool type 'eraser') to detect and remove all diagram element types. Add hit detection logic in the handleMouseDown and handleMouseMove handlers when selectedTool === 'eraser' to check if the mouse coordinates intersect with icons (DiagramIcon), text labels (TextLabel), freehand drawings (FreehandDrawing), lines/arrows (Line/Connection), or images (Image). When an element is intersected, call the appropriate delete function from useAttackPathState (deleteIcon, deleteTextLabel, deleteFreehandDrawing, deleteLine, deleteConnection, deleteImage). Ensure eraser logic does not interfere with other tool behaviors.

requirements.summary: Extend the free transform tool to support selecting, moving, and resizing icon elements (DiagramIcon) in the diagram
acceptanceCriteria: Activating the free transform tool and clicking an icon displays a selection bounding box with resize handles
Dragging an icon while free transform is active moves it to the new position
Dragging a corner or edge handle resizes the icon proportionally or freely
Icon position and size changes are persisted to diagram state
Existing free transform behavior for images and text labels is not broken

file_operations.description: Extend the free transform tool (toolbar button 8, tool type 'freeTransform') to support icons. Add selection logic in handleMouseDown when selectedTool === 'freeTransform' to detect clicks on icon elements and store the selected icon reference (similar to selectedImage and selectedLabel). Render a selection bounding box with 8 resize handles around the selected icon (reuse the existing renderResizeHandles pattern for images/text). Implement drag-to-move behavior in handleMouseMove to update the icon's position via updateIcon from useAttackPathState. Implement resize handle dragging to scale the icon's width and height, updating icon state via updateIcon. Add deselection logic on background clicks to clear the selected icon. Ensure existing free transform behavior for images and text labels continues to work.

Add an updateIcon function to the useAttackPathState hook that accepts an icon id and partial icon properties (position, width, height) and updates the corresponding icon in the icons array, recording the change in history for undo/redo. Ensure the Icon interface in this file supports width and height properties if not already present.
